"""
Enhanced System Librarian
Maintains transcript logs, generates documentation, and manages system knowledge
Provides complete system understanding from any module's perspective
"""

from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Any
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from enum import Enum
import json
from datetime import datetime
import uuid


class DocumentType(Enum):
    """Types of documents generated by librarian"""
    TRANSCRIPT = "transcript"
    TECHNICAL_DOC = "technical_documentation"
    API_REFERENCE = "api_reference"
    USER_MANUAL = "user_manual"
    MODULE_GUIDE = "module_guide"
    REPORT = "report"
    AUDIT_LOG = "audit_log"


@dataclass
class TranscriptEntry:
    """Single entry in system transcript"""
    entry_id: str
    timestamp: str
    module: str
    action: str
    details: Dict[str, Any]
    actor: str  # user or bot_id
    success: bool
    duration_ms: Optional[int] = None
    
    def to_dict(self) -> Dict:
        return {
            "entry_id": self.entry_id,
            "timestamp": self.timestamp,
            "module": self.module,
            "action": self.action,
            "details": self.details,
            "actor": self.actor,
            "success": self.success,
            "duration_ms": self.duration_ms
        }


@dataclass
class SystemKnowledge:
    """Knowledge entry about system aspect"""
    knowledge_id: str
    category: str
    topic: str
    description: str
    related_modules: List[str]
    related_functions: List[str]
    references: List[str]
    created_at: str
    updated_at: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now().isoformat())
    
    def to_dict(self) -> Dict:
        return {
            "knowledge_id": self.knowledge_id,
            "category": self.category,
            "topic": self.topic,
            "description": self.description,
            "related_modules": self.related_modules,
            "related_functions": self.related_functions,
            "references": self.references,
            "created_at": self.created_at,
            "updated_at": self.updated_at
        }


@dataclass
class GeneratedDocument:
    """Document generated by librarian"""
    doc_id: str
    doc_type: DocumentType
    title: str
    content: str
    format: str  # markdown, html, json
    metadata: Dict[str, Any]
    created_at: str
    version: str = "1.0"
    
    def to_dict(self) -> Dict:
        return {
            "doc_id": self.doc_id,
            "doc_type": self.doc_type.value,
            "title": self.title,
            "content": self.content,
            "format": self.format,
            "metadata": self.metadata,
            "created_at": self.created_at,
            "version": self.version
        }
